case_title: RHONDA HARRIS VS. HEATHER BRITTON ET AL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HARRIS, RHONDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTON, HEATHER BRITTON, BRITT THOMAS, TIM OCEAN LIMOUSINE SERVICES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, RHONDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTON, BRITT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-06-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF RHONDA HARRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S HEATHER BRITTON, BRITT BRITTON, TIM THOMAS AND OCEAN LIMOUSINE SERVICES, LLC ARE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT'S OCEAN LIMOUSINE SERVICES, TIM THOMAS OR BRITT BRITTON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, RHONDA

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, RHONDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTON, BRITT THOMAS, TIM OCEAN LIMOUSINE SERVICES, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, RHONDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRITTON, HEATHER $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00, $10000.00. DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR THE ACCIDENT AND PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES EXCEED THE COURT'S JURISDICTIONAL LIMITS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTON, HEATHER
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, RHONDA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-26-2018 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RHONDA HARRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-25-2018 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NON PARTY ATTEMPTED TO APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF TO RENEW REQUEST TO CONTINUE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS DENIED ON FRIDAY MARCH 23, 2018 BY CLERK'S OFFICE FOR SHORT NOTICE. JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY HAS GRANTED A ONE TIME ONLY CONTINUANCE CITING CCP 187, FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE FOR ALL DEFENDANT'S. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
